title: Incense Cones Fumino Fresh Multipack Essentials Bundle 6 Boxes 90 Pieces Masala Agarbatti Joss Fragrance for Relaxation and Meditation, Home and House Decor Scent
features: A FRAGRANCE FOR EVERY TASTE: Explore 6 unique and captivating scents, including the sophisticated Black Noir and the refreshing citrus of Tropical Rainforest. With 90 cones in this special incense cone bundle, you can indulge in luxurious fragrances for every mood. The bundle includes Tropical Rainforest, Autumn Breeze, Californian White Sage, Spring Meadow, Simply Sandalwood, and Black Noir.

HANDCRAFTED EXCELLENCE: Our incense cones are meticulously hand-rolled by skilled craftswomen at our family factory in Bangalore, the incense capital of the world. The human touch ensures precision and care, resulting in a superior product.

NATURAL INGREDIENTS, GENTLE SCENTS: Immerse yourself in nature's finest scents. Carefully selected natural ingredients, including laurel wood, bamboo, aromatic herbs, essential oils, and exotic spices, create gentle fragrances that our customers love.

LONGER BURNING: Enjoy a longer-lasting, up to 25-minute burn time with our masala variety incense cones. Hand-rolled to perfection, they contain a higher percentage of natural artisanal ingredients, resulting in a thicker, more refined cone. Revel in a light, refreshing fragrance without overwhelming smoke.

QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST: Our commitment to quality is endorsed by Bureau Veritas, a reputable global inspection agency. Rest assured that our incense cones are free from harmful chemicals and heavy metals. Join the ranks of satisfied customers who appreciate the peace of mind with our high-quality incense cones.
